news.t: Harbor Capital Advisors Celebrates 3-Year Anniversary of OSEA, the Harbor ETF Managed by Strategic Partner C WorldWide
Harbor Capital Advisors to Expand ETF Suite with International Compounders ETF

holdings.infoBox: OSEA is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 7.58%, ASML Holding at 6.40%, HOYA Corporation at 4.52%, Siemens Aktiengesellschaft at 4.52%, and AstraZeneca at 4.23%.

overview.description: The Harbor International Compounders ETF (OSEA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects international companies with sustainable growth based on positive fundamentals and ESG criteria. The fund targets compounders and excludes US firms in aim for long-term capital appreciation. OSEA was launched on Sep 6, 2022 and is issued by Harbor.
